positions.label: Il-2 regiment in continuous ground-attack sorties
Low-level strikes ahead of the breakthrough

summary: The 505th Assault Aviation Regiment was an Il-2 Shturmovik regiment of the 206th Assault Aviation Division. A Soviet assault regiment fielded roughly 20–32 Il-2s and flew punishing low-level attacks against German ground forces, taking heavy losses in return.
notes: Tier-2 drill-down: renders on the map only when its division or the regiment itself is selected. Pilot coverage: Stalingrad.
